# Purpose
This header file defines an enumeration `GAPLEClient` and a type alias `GAPLEClientBitset` for use in a C++ program. The `GAPLEClient` enum specifies different client types, such as `GAPLEClientKernel` and `GAPLEClientApp`, and includes a count `GAPLEClientNum`. The `GAPLEClientBitset` is defined as an alias for `uint8_t`, which is likely used to represent a set of client states or flags. The function `gap_le_pebble_task_bit_for_client` is declared to convert a `GAPLEClient` enum value into a `PebbleTaskBitset`, which is presumably defined in the included header `kernel/pebble_tasks.h`. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on client type management and conversion within a specific application context.
